info.title: Runbook Fetcher
info.description: Fetches the relevant runbook from S3 for a given incident type

get.description: Retrieves the runbook for an incident type from the S3 runbook repository. Always call this BEFORE taking any remediation action so you follow the correct procedure. Types: pod-crashloop, high-cpu, oom-killed, database-connection, deployment-unavailable, image-pull-error.

parameters.name: incident_type
parameters.description: Incident type string, e.g. pod-crashloop, high-cpu, oom-killed, database-connection
